STT 1, 039 + [Poor Man of Nippur][via cams/gkab]

[...] e-re-⸢bi⸣-[šu₂]

When [he] entered [...],

o 22

[...] ma-ḫar-[šu₂]

[...] before [him],

o 33

[... MAN] ⸢kiš⸣-ša₂-ti i-kar-⸢rab⸣

[...] he greeted [the king] of the world.

o 44

[...] x ŠU TA ⸢RA? d⸣LAMMA

[...] ... a lamassu-deity.

o 55

[...] ⸢li⸣-di-nu-nim-ma

"May they give me [...]!

o 66

[... i-zi]-⸢im⸣-tu₂ lu-uk!(KU-)šu-ud!(DU)

"[...] that I may achieve (my) desire.

o 77

[...] ⸢MA⸣.NA ⸢ru?⸣-uš-e KU₃.SI₂₂

"[...] mina of red gold."

o 88

[... i-zi-im-ta]-⸢ka⸣ mi-nu-um-ma

[...] "What is your desire

o 99

[...] x kal u₄-me

"[...] ... a whole day?"

o 1010

[...] ⸢ra⸣-bu-[te]

[...] noblemen,

o 1111

[...] x [...]

[...] ... [...].

(rest of obverse missing)
